headline: The Hidden Engine That Could Power Exxon Mobil Stock Higher
summary: While all eyes are on its giant oil fields, the real surprise for Exxon might be coming from its massive, and suddenly very profitable, refining business.

headline: How Elevated Oil Prices are Boosting BP's Energy Business
summary: WTI above $85 and Middle East tensions are lifting crude, supporting BP's upstream earnings as it touts 14 discoveries since early 2025.

headline: Energy Stocks Are Back From the Dead: IYE Up 27% YTD
summary: If you bought iShares U.S. Energy ETF (NYSEARCA:IYE) on the last trading day of 2025 at about $47 and you are still holding it this morning at about $61, you are sitting on an about 29% gain in a little over five months. headline: ConocoPhillips (COP) A Deep Value Stock To Buy Following Long-Term LNG Deal
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is a deep value stock to invest in now. On May 18, ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) signed a long-term natural gas supply deal with Glenfarne’s Alaska LNG. The 30-year agreement secures natural gas produced on Alaska’s North Slope, as part of the Alaska LNG project. The agreement underscores ConocoPhillips’ commitment to developing Alaska’s resources for […]
